text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way to the trainers' lounge, I<n>notice
Marvelous Sunday talking to a<n>prospective
student.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You came for the academy's open<n>house, right?!
☆ What did ya think?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing—everyone's so fast. But<n>I don't
think I could keep up with the<n>training...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even good enough to win a<n>single race.
I've always wanted to,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You can't give up on your marvelous<n>dreams
before the starting line! ☆<n>Chasing them is the
whole reason<n>you're here, isn't it? ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'm gonna show you all the<n>marvelous
things Tracen Academy<n>has to offer—the stuff they
didn't<n>show you for the open house! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hop on my back! Marvelous<n>Sunday's Marvelous
Academy Tour<n>is a go!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Eeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday races off with the<n>prospective
student clinging on for<n>dear life!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Wasn't that one of the open<n>house
participants? Why is<n>Marvelous running off with
her?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Stop right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Marvey?! Are you giving out random<n>piggyback
rides now?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! ☆ I'm giving her a<n>Marvelous Academy
Tour!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that sounds fun! Oh, watch out!<n>Air
Groove's right on your tail!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't let her catch you, Marvey! I'll<n>cheer you on
from the sidelines!<n>Popcorn, where's my
popcorn...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is that Marvelous and the vice<n>prez?
Youngsters these days have a<n>lot of energy, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You can do it, you two!<n>Whatever it is!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Last stop: the academy's training<n>course! We're
almost at the finish<n>line! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There you are! Oh, when I catch you,<n>Marvelous
Sunday—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: She found us! ☆ Time for the last<n>spurt! ★

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I'm weighing you<n>down—she's
definitely going to catch<n>us!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! ☆ Just hold on,<n>'cause I'm gonna
make this a<n>marvelous finish! ★

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Wow! It's like we're one<n>with the wind!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But she's gaining on us! Don't lose,<n>Marvelous!
You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: You bet I can! ☆★ Just... a little...<n>further!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: All right, this game of tag is over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Marvelous Sunday's valiant<n>effort, Air
Groove catches up to her<n>just before the finish
line.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Finally. You've got some explaining<n>to do,
Marvelous Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see. So you were trying to<n>inspire her.
What do you think, new<n>prospect? Did it work?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! Hearing everyone cheer us<n>on was
amazing. It made me<n>remember that I'm not alone!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And even when things looked bad,<n>Marvelous
never gave up... I wanna<n>be just like her!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Now you get it! ☆ Friends cheering<n>each other on is
marvelous, and so is<n>having the spirit to always
move<n>forward! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
That's the heart of what Tracen<n>Academy stands
for! ☆ Isn't it<n>marvelous? ★ Ahahahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I like the fire in your eyes.<n>Anyway, I
suppose I'll overlook your<n>little getaway act,
Marvelous Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Yay! That's marvelously kind of you,<n>Vice Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Marvelous Sunday's<n>impromptu tour, it
looks like Tracen<n>Academy has gained a
promising<n>new racer!
